src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Remove the airport relationship field from the Aircraft model.
Change the primary key type from int to long to support larger identifiers.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.human_impl: Changed private int airportId to private long airportId

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Add a new field to store the airport name.
Remove the aircrafts collection from the Airport entity.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.human_impl: Removed List<Aircraft> aircrafts and its mapping

src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Make the entity implement a common IdedEntity interface.
Update the constructor signature to match the new fields and types.
src/main/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.human_impl: Changed constructor params to exclude id and include airportName

src/test/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 annotations and runner with JUnit 5 equivalents to align with Spring Boot 2.2+ default testing framework.
src/test/java/com/aerotravel/flightticke.human_impl: Replaced 'import org.junit.Test' with 'import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test' and removed '@RunWith(SpringRunner.class)' and related imports.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 2.7.2 to align with Java 11 support and modern Spring ecosystem.
Update the Java source and target version property from 1.8 to 11.
